headline: Is American Tower Stock a Smart Buy Before Q1 Earnings Release?
summary: AMT heads into Q1 earnings results with rising revenues fueled by 5G and data demand, but AFFO per share is expected to have declined year over year.

headline: AST SpaceMobile Drops 15% After Blue Origin Satellite Mishap
summary: A Blue Origin launch failure sent ASTS shares down 15% after BlueBird 7 was deposited in too low an orbit, compounding existing schedule delays ahead of its 2026 satellite deployment goal.

raw.headline: AST SpaceMobile Drops 15% After Blue Origin Satellite Mishap
